name: BoltzDesign1
description: Design protein binders using inverted Boltz-1 model. All atom model enables generating diverse complexes with flexible ligand conformations.
capabilities: Design protein binders using inverted Boltz-1 model
All atom model enables generating diverse complexes with flexible ligand conformations

pdbFile.description: Target structure in PDB format for binder design

binderLength.description: Length or length range for the designed binder

numDesigns.description: Number of binder designs to generate
